js_prompt.context: Create vanilla JS for SAGE MINT school website. Implement all interactions without libraries. Max 5KB minified target. ES6+ with fallbacks.

modules.name: Navigation
features: Mobile menu toggle: hamburger ☰ ↔ ✕ animation (classList toggle)
Sticky navbar: add .scrolled class on scroll > 50px (backdrop blur + shadow)
Active section highlight: Intersection Observer on sections, update nav links

modules.name: Hero Slider
features: Prev/Next buttons clear interval then change slide

modules.name: 3D Tilt Effect
features: Mouse move: calculate offset from center (e.clientX - rect.left)
Apply rotateX and rotateY (max ±8deg) via style.transform
Mouse leave: reset transform with transition

modules.name: Parallax Hero
features: Layered elements move at different speeds on mousemove

modules.name: Counter Animation
features: Animate from 0 to target number (data-target attribute)

modules.name: Tab Filtering
features: Student affairs section: tabs [Extracurricular, Achievements, Activities]
Click handler: filter grid items by category data attribute
Fade out → rearrange → fade in animation

modules.name: Lightbox Gallery
features: Click gallery image → open modal with full size
Close on X button, overlay click, or Escape key

modules.name: Form Handling
features: Input focus effects coordination with CSS

modules.name: Scroll Animations
features: Once: true (don't re-animate on scroll up)

technical_requirements: Passive event listeners: {passive: true} for scroll/touch
Support: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge (last 2 versions)
performance: Use CSS transforms over left/top positioning
js_prompt.output: Complete <script> block at bottom of body, organized: Utils, Components (classes or factory functions), Init (DOMContentLoaded)
